title: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lucknow is a city in Uttar Pradesh with a population of 3,500,000. The capital of Uttar Pradesh, known for its Nawabi-era elegance, Mughal cuisine, intricate embroidery, and historic architecture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
